name: ASRock B660M-HDV Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel B660 Chipset - Support DDR4-5066(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - D-Sub - Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B660M-HDV Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel B660
description: Micro ATX Intel B660 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with multiple display outputs and DDR4-5066 support.
